2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch fixes a race condition in the make_uffd_wp_huge_pte() function, which is responsible for setting the UFFD_WP bit on present HugeTLB PTEs. The issue arises when the function fetches a snapshot of the PTE without first clearing it with huge_ptep_modify_prot_start(), allowing hardware updates to occur between the original read and commit. To fix this, the patch mirrors the pattern used in make_uffd_wp_pte() for non-hugetlb PTEs by adding calls to huge_ptep_modify_prot_start() and ptep_modify_prot_commit(). This ensures that the kernel-owned snapshot remains consistent until the commit, preventing the loss of updates. The migration case is left unchanged as it does not involve present PTEs.
